title: NvmMetadata.len field undocumented
description: nvm.rs line 58: NvmMetadata.len has no doc comment. It is not self-evident whether 'len' is the object length in bytes, a block count, or something else. Every other field on the struct now has a doc comment (id, access, flags, label all gained docs) except len. Add a /// doc comment stating it is the data length in bytes as reported by the wolfHSM server.
